info.title: Identities Management
info.description: Manage identity data related to users, groups and roles from your Talend Cloud account.

servers.description: URL for the AWS Europe region
URL for the AWS Asia Pacific region
URL for the AWS United States East region
URL for the AWS Australia region
URL for the Azure United States West region

get.summary: Retrieve a list of filtered groups

401.description: The system failed to authenticate the user. Either the Authorization header was missing or the provided token was incorrect.

403.description: The system failed to authorize the user. The provided token was recognized but did not have the rights to perform the action. Contact your security administrator to get the appropriate rights.

429.description: Too many requests were sent. Check the X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining and X-RateLimit-Reset headers.

500.description: The server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling the request.

userIds.description: List of user ids belonging to the group

active.description: Boolean indicating if the user is active

roleIds.description: List of roles ids for the user

permissions.description: List of permissions associated with the role

MeResponse.description: User or service account returned by Me endpoint

firstName.description: First name of the user (user only)

lastName.description: Last name of the user (user only)

middleName.description: Middle name of the user (user only)

preferredLanguage.description: Preferred language of the user (user only)

permissions.description: Permissions of the service account (service account only)

accountId.description: Account id of the user (user only)

lastModified.description: Last modified date of the resource

lastSetPasswordDate.description: Last set password date of the user (user only)

page.description: Number of the page to be returned. If you put 2, the second page of the query result is returned.
